title: stelis digitifera
intro: Stelis digitifera, also known as the finger-root orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis digitifera include its potential to treat wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
